topics.title: Temporary power: one machine one box one leak protector
risk_signal: multiple plugs in one switch box
qa_points: Each electrical equipment should be controlled by a dedicated switch box.
Do not use one switch box to directly control two or more equipment.
Temporary cables should be routed overhead or protected against mechanical damage.
Distribution boxes should be closed and locked with clear labels.
actions: Split shared circuits into dedicated switch boxes.
Remove temporary multi-plug adapters in distribution area.
Inspect cable insulation and replace damaged wires immediately.

topics.title: Hot work permit and fire watch
qa_points: Hot work should be approved before operation in risk zones.
A dedicated fire watcher should be assigned during and after hot work.
Combustibles should be removed or isolated before operation.
actions: Suspend hot work if permit and fire-watch are absent.
Clear 10m surrounding combustibles or set isolation barrier.
Place extinguisher and check operability before ignition.

topics.title: Work-at-height fall protection
qa_points: Workers at height should use qualified fall-arrest systems.
Edges/openings should have guardrails and warning marks.
Scaffold inspection should be completed before use.
actions: Stop operation in unsafe edge/opening areas.
Install temporary guardrails and anchor points.
Re-inspect scaffold and issue go/no-go tag.

topics.title: Lifting operation safety
qa_points: Lifting plans and load limits should be verified before operation.
No personnel should stay under suspended loads.
Slings and hooks should be inspected and replaced when damaged.
actions: Set exclusion zone under lifting path.
Recalculate load and select compliant rigging.

topics.title: Confined space entry control
qa_points: Confined space entry should follow permit and gas test procedures.
Forced ventilation and communication should be maintained.
Rescue standby should be available outside the space.
actions: Prohibit entry until atmosphere test passes.
Start forced ventilation and continuous monitoring.
Assign standby and rescue equipment at entry point.

topics.title: PPE and behavioral safety
qa_points: PPE should match hazard category and be worn correctly.
Access to restricted zones should be controlled.
Unsafe behaviors should be corrected on site.
actions: Perform spot checks and deny entry without PPE.
Correct PPE wearing and retrain violators.
Mark restricted zones and enforce access control.
